## Interface BulkWriter.Factory<T>

* * *




        [@FunctionalInterface](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/FunctionalInterface.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        public static interface BulkWriter.Factory<T>
        extends [Serializable](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/Serializable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

A factory that creates a [`BulkWriter`](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.serialization").

  *     * ### Method Summary

All Methods [Instance Methods](<javascript:show\(2\);>) [Abstract Methods](<javascript:show\(4\);>) Modifier and Type | Method and Description
---|---
`[BulkWriter](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.Factory.html> "type parameter in BulkWriter.Factory")>` | `[create](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.Factory.html#create-org.apache.flink.core.fs.FSDataOutputStream->)([FSDataOutputStream](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/fs/FSDataOutputStream.html> "class in org.apache.flink.core.fs") out)` Creates a writer that writes to the given stream.

  *     * ### Method Detail

      * #### create

            [BulkWriter](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/common/serialization/BulkWriter.Factory.html> "type parameter in BulkWriter.Factory")> create([FSDataOutputStream](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/fs/FSDataOutputStream.html> "class in org.apache.flink.core.fs") out)
                          throws [IOException](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Creates a writer that writes to the given stream.

Parameters:
    `out` \- The output stream to write the encoded data to.
Throws:
    `[IOException](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- Thrown if the writer cannot be opened, or if the output stream throws an exception.
